text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
A concert to celebrate the<n>achievements of
Umamusume in the<n>world of racing is coming up
soon.<n>I'm heading to the student council<n>office to
drop off a copy of a new<n>song that's set to debut,
when...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
What are we going to sing? Oh golly,<n>I'm so
excited!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: We're supposed to get the song<n>today... Ah!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
In your hand... Is that the demo for<n>"Never Looking
Back"?!
choice_data_list:
Yeah, I'm supposed to deliver it to the student
council president.

Yeah, I'm supposed to deliver it to the student
council president.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Prez is out, but I know all the details.<n>I'll take that
off your hands!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: The three of us are going to do thevocals on the new track! Actually, wewere just having a meeting aboutit!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
I can't believe we get to sing! Isn't<n>this great,
Suzuka?

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Oh... sure...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Uh, it's just... Am I really a good<n>choice for a
vocalist?

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
There are tons of better singers out<n>there who'd
love to do the concert...

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Ohhh, so that's why you've been<n>looking kinda
down.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
But, come on, there's more to being a<n>vocalist
than just singing nicely.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
There's the style of the song to think<n>about, plus
teamwork with the other<n>vocalists... I think there's
a good<n>reason the three of us got picked.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
She's right! I'm pretty nervous too,<n>but I know
I've just gotta go for it!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Plus, I get to do it with you two, the<n>first friends I
made after coming to<n>Tracen. That makes me so
happy!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Oh, Spe...

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Well, you don't have to make your<n>mind up right
now. Either way, we're<n>gonna practice for the
concert.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: ...Yeah, okay.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
All right, let's kick this thing off! It's<n>our first-ever
event as an official trio!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Let's do it! So I was thinking, we<n>should have a
little party together!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Hmm, I kinda wanna get some<n>exercise though.
How about you,<n>Suzuka?

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
I... really don't know. Um, which do<n>you think is
good?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
A get-together it is! We can munch on<n>some
snacks while we chat!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Chatting and snacking? I have a very<n>bad feeling
about this...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Hehe! I brought cake, pudding,<n>parfaits, meat
buns, and<n>hamburgers... What a feast! You two
dig in, you hear? ♪

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: I knew it!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Is all the stuff on that one platesupposed to be for me? That'senough food for a whole day! My stomach's gonna explode if I eat itall!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
You've gotta try these hamburgers!<n>They're so
juicy and yummy!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. They do look quite good. You<n>can have mine
too if you like.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Really?! Don't mind if I do!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: So that's Suzuka's strategy!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Phew... So much eating, so muchchatting! I had so much fun!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
...Me too. It's surprising how much<n>we didn't
know about each other<n>even though we're
roommates.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, for sure. And you really saved<n>me from a
food coma, Suzuka. When<n>I'm with you two,
anything seems<n>possible!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
The more we learn about each other,<n>the better our
concert performance<n>will be!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Oh... Will getting to know one another<n>better help
us synchronize our<n>voices?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Absolutely! I just know we can find a<n>unique
harmony that's all our own!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
A unique harmony... A song for the<n>three of us... Is
that why I was<n>chosen?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: I can't wait to see how our song<n>turns out!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: ...Yeah, me neither.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Our version of "Never Looking Back"...<n>I really
can't wait to hear it.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Don't forget, we'll be singing other<n>songs too!
Better get to rehearsing<n>while we can!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Let's do some light practice focusingon the offbeat today. You knowrhythm's vital for both singing anddancing!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Okay, so the main beat is BA ba, BA<n>ba and the
offbeat is ba BAP, ba<n>BAP... Like that?

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
You got it. Let's keep it simple and<n>just jump in
time with the offbeat!<n>Aaand... go!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Am I doing it right?

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Perfect! Just like that, Spe!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Uh, umm... BA bap, BA bap...

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Oh, Suzuka, you switched to the main<n>beat. If you
get confused, just count<n>"one and two and three
and four,"<n>and jump on every "and"!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Hop on the "and" part... Okay, got it.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
One! Hop! Two! Hop! Three! Hop!<n>Four! Hop!
...Like that?

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Y-yeah. You're doing... perfect.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Hehe! Suzuka, the way you say hop<n>like you're a
li'l bunny is so<n>gosh-darn cute!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: ...Wait. Did I say that out loud?

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Ahaha! You didn't notice? You were<n>counting
"One! Hop! Two! Hop!"

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: ...I'm so embarrassed.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Oh, don't worry! It wasn't weird or<n>anything! I
think that's a great way to<n>count!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, let's teach everyone to do it<n>like that during
the full rehearsal!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Really? Well... I'm glad I could help.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
...I suppose even when I fumble, I can<n>still help
everyone with the routine.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Y'know, I've always been a natural<n>at this, so
I'm not exactly sure how to<n>teach people who are
struggling.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
So there are some things you don't<n>know. I
wonder... Maybe that's why<n>they put me on
vocals too.
